reviews.review_description: I finally got this game back ￼

Like the comment ig you were a og baboon player but anyway it’s a civil masterpiece
:)

The new version is bad like Players glitching,Monster is glitching too, blue screen, and lost most of the features it used to have like the mirror, cones that block the monsters, and backrooms but it didn’t work

reviews.review_title: Got some issues but this game is so good
reviews.review_description:
Game is good but the monsters are WAY too fast and the map is a maze
(Not hate!!!)
Fearful facility 2 is better than this the monsters are so fast
Ever since scary baboon got revamped it just makes me feel like I'm playing scary baboon kinda I love this game
OG scary baboon was amazing but since it's gone I'm gonna try this game, I hope it's good

The game is the best with good and kind staff and a good owner i recommend this game everyone and it is a really fun game in general and has good frequent updates and ignore that comment about the racist stuff it is not true i have seen what happened and crypto (the person that posted the comment) told stormy to kill him self so just enjoy the game and have an amazing time !!!!
The game is one of the most exiting fun epic horror I expect a lot to come from this game the mods were calling racial slurs and the developer was very kind
The monsters are not too op so you actually have a chance to run away instead of getting obliterated, and I like the addition of the monster tracker, so great game if the map has a bit more updates
I saw this on a YouTube video and yet to download it lowkey exited ngl
